INFO.Unnamed: 1: Reference sheet for requesting comparable supplier quotes.
Collectible trading card game; four named 40-card starter decks for alpha testing.
Approx. 300 gsm white-core card stock (supplier to recommend exact stock).
Matte varnish or matte lamination; confirm available options.
4 separate decks × 40 cards = 160 cards per complete set.
30 packs per box = 300 cards per box.
Custom 72 × 125 mm pack artwork; supplier must confirm material, dieline, seams, bleed and orientation.
Ask whether 1 holographic replacement card can be included per starter deck or pack; it is not an extra card.
Deck samples: 1, 5, and 10 copies of each of 4 decks. Booster samples: 3, 5, 10, 20, 50 and 500 boxes.
Enter an amount when known, or write “DDP shipping included”, “shipping excluded”, or “shipping pending”.
Request setup, proof, production time, shipping to Sweden, VAT/taxes, and complete delivered total.
